unqualified: Thank you for calling {company}. Unfortunately, we're unable to assist at this time. We wish you the best in your recovery journey.

duplicate: Thank you for calling. It looks like we've already spoken about this. A team member will be with you shortly.
I see we've talked before. Let me connect you with the same specialist who assisted you previously.
callback: Thank you for your patience. A specialist will call you back within 24 hours at {phone}.
We've noted your request. Expect a call from us within 1-2 business days.
transfer: I'm going to transfer you to our specialist who can better assist you. Please hold for just a moment.

general: Thank you for calling {company}. How may I assist you today?
